steps.name: Extend cb-log SKILL.md with --format json output branch
criteria: /cb-log --slug {slug} --text '...' --format json emits valid JSON with status:ok, entry_id, team, written_to
entry_id matches YYYY-MM-DD-NNN format with correct sequence number
--format json absent: existing prose behaviour fully unchanged
Unknown slug with --format json emits status:error JSON with team and error fields
Path resolution failure with --format json emits status:error JSON
Path resolution uses --slug + engagements_root, not cwd (AV-6)
steps.scenario_name: PA calls cb-log with --format json and receives a valid JSON ack
steps.implementation_notes: SKILL.md-only step — production artifact is skills/cb-log/SKILL.md. Add a new ## Output format section or conditional branch in the existing output section: when --format json present, emit inline JSON template instead of prose. Preserve all existing write logic, path resolution (Engagement Path Resolver), and entry format unchanged. JSON ack must include: status (ok/error), entry_id (from written entry frontmatter id field), team (from slug), written_to (resolved file path). Error branch: if path resolution fails OR engagement folder not found, emit status:error JSON instead of prose error. EXEMPT FROM PARADIGM: SKILL.md prose — no automated unit tests. Acceptance scenarios in .feature files are the RED gate.

steps.name: Create cb-query SKILL.md with Extraction Grammar and prose output
criteria: /cb-query {slug} returns readable prose summary with open actions, open/deferred hypotheses, last capture date, last retro date
Extraction Grammar applied: open actions from RETRO_ACTIONS.md (non-evidenced rows), open hypotheses from COACHING_LOG.md (no Validation or Validation:open/deferred)
Confirmed and rejected hypotheses NOT listed as open
--since defaults to 14 days; accepts ISO date override
Open hypotheses older than --since window still surfaced (D6: openness independent of window)
No board_tool in config: summary produced without board section, no error shown
Unknown slug returns clear prose error naming the slug
Missing --slug with multiple engagements triggers disambiguation prompt
--slug resolves from engagements_root (legacy and root layout via Engagement Path Resolver)
steps.scenario_name: Coach queries an engagement and receives a readable summary
steps.implementation_notes: SKILL.md-only step — CREATE NEW skills/cb-query/SKILL.md. Must include: (1) Engagement Path Resolver verbatim from cb-log (ADR-008 self-containment), (2) Named Extraction Grammar (ADR-014): open_actions = RETRO_ACTIONS.md rows where Evidenced column != 'yes' and Status != 'done'; open_hypotheses = COACHING_LOG.md entries where Validation field absent OR Validation status is 'open' or 'deferred'; confirmed/rejected hypotheses excluded, (3) --since window filtering entries read but NOT closing open hypotheses (D6), (4) prose output sections: Open Retro Actions, Coaching Hypotheses (open + deferred), Last capture date, Last retro date, (5) graceful omission of board section when board_tool absent from config.json. EXEMPT FROM PARADIGM: SKILL.md prose — no automated unit tests.

steps.name: Extend cb-query SKILL.md with --format json output branch and degraded path
criteria: /cb-query --slug {slug} --format json emits valid JSON with status:ok and all PA contract fields

ok response includes: team, open_actions (with description, evidenced boolean), open_hypotheses (with text, status), last_capture (ISO date), last_retro (ISO date or null), wip_aged (array), signal_summary (2-3 sentence engagement-health scope only, DW-2)
signal_summary contains ONLY engagement-health signals — no calendar/chat/non-engagement-file references
Board MCP unavailable: status:degraded, wip_aged:[], warnings array populated, all other fields present
No board_tool in config: status:degraded, wip_aged:[], warnings explains no board tool configured
Unknown slug: status:error JSON with team and error fields, no other fields
--format json absent: Slice 02 prose behaviour unchanged
Board MCP available (@requires_external): wip_aged items contain title and age_days (positive integer)
steps.scenario_name: PA queries an engagement with --format json and receives a valid ok response
steps.implementation_notes: SKILL.md-only step — EXTEND skills/cb-query/SKILL.md. Add --format json branch: when present, emit inline JSON template per PA contract schema v1.0.0-draft (DW-3). signal_summary MUST be scoped to engagement-health domain only per DW-2: mention hypothesis age, action evidenced ratio, WIP age — no calendar/chat signals. Degraded path: if board_tool absent from config OR board MCP call fails, set status:degraded, wip_aged:[], add warnings array entry. Error path: if path resolution fails, emit status:error with team and error only (no other fields). Inline JSON schema definition in SKILL.md prose so LLM emits conformant JSON. EXEMPT FROM PARADIGM: SKILL.md prose — no automated unit tests.
